about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Your trusted English-language companion for exploring the wonders of China
about.offerSubtitle: Everything you need for an unforgettable China journey
about.ctaSubtitle: Start planning your journey today with our curated city guides.
about.missionP1: China Travel Guide was created with one goal in mind: to make the wonders of China accessible and approachable for international travelers. China is a vast and fascinating country with over 5,000 years of history, but navigating it as a first-time visitor can feel daunting.
about.missionP2: We bring together authentic travel experiences from popular cities like Beijing, Xi'an, and Chengdu, as well as hidden gems off the beaten path. Every guide is written in clear English by travelers who have walked the streets, tasted the food, and immersed themselves in the culture.
about.missionP3: From the Terracotta Warriors and the Great Wall to fiery Sichuan hot pot and adorable giant pandas, we want to help you plan the perfect China adventure — with practical tips, honest recommendations, and the warmth of local insight.
about.f1Desc: Detailed guides for every major destination, covering attractions, food, itineraries, and tips.
about.f2Desc: Authentic experiences and practical advice shared by travelers who have been there.
about.f3Desc: From street food to time-honored brands, discover the true flavors of each city.
about.f4Desc: Day-by-day travel plans you can follow directly, perfect for first-time visitors.
about.f5Desc: Transport, accommodation, and cultural tips to make your trip smooth and worry-free.
about.f6Desc: Written in clear English with international tourists in mind, bridging cultures.

footer.desc: Your trusted companion for exploring China. We gather real travel experiences from popular cities and hidden gems, providing practical and reliable guidance for every traveler visiting the wonders of China.
footer.copyright: © {year} China Travel Guide | Crafting unforgettable journeys across China
